text: You are stronger than the urge. You always have been.
author: Guardian Angel

text: Every moment you choose better, you become better.
author: Guardian Angel

text: Your guardian has stood between you and harm. Keep going.
author: Guardian Angel

text: This discomfort passes. The person you are becoming does not.
author: Guardian Angel

text: One moment of weakness does not define you. Walking away does.
author: Guardian Angel

text: You started this journey for a reason. Remember it.
author: Guardian Angel
